name: for_footnotes
description: Footnotes plugin for TinyMCE (FriendsOfREDAXO, free & open-source)

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_footnotes/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_footnotes/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_footnotes/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_footnotes/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
